fuzzer_role.value_profile_cmplog: primary pair A -- vpc; carries I2S delta over vp
fuzzer_role.value_profile: primary pair B -- vp; baseline without I2S

expected_direction: vpc > vp; vpc/vp ratio grows monotonically with CHAIN_LEN

expected_curve_per_fuzzer.value_profile_cmplog: linear-in-CHAIN_LEN decay (one I2S substitute per slot, CHAIN_LEN slots required); resolves at every scan value
expected_curve_per_fuzzer.value_profile: exponential-in-CHAIN_LEN decay; ~0 at CHAIN_LEN>=4 within 600s budget

acceptance.rule: vpc median > 0 at every CHAIN_LEN; vp median monotone non-increasing in CHAIN_LEN; vpc/vp ratio strictly increasing in CHAIN_LEN

design_basis: N-slot multi-byte literal chain mirrors libpcap pcap-filter grammar where the trap (bpf_optimize returning -1 via opt_error from a divisor-zero constant-fold) is gated on the input containing a sequence of valid grammar tokens at fixed offsets. Each slot's 4-byte keyword is checked via memcmp; cmplog logs each as one I2S dictionary entry. vp lacks I2S so each slot's gradient is independent (per-edge Hamming bucket); compounding across CHAIN_LEN independent slot CMPs gives exponential decay in CHAIN_LEN. Orthogonal complement to i2s_pair_relational_lookup (which fixes CHAIN_LEN=2 and varies DICT_SIZE).
notes: CHAIN_LEN is COMPILE-TIME; one Dockerfile per scan value at libafl_fuzzbench/docker/targets/Dockerfile.b_grammar_chain_l{1,2,4,8}.

KEYWORD_LEN fixed at 4 (matches lcms FOURCC scale and pcap-filter token width); CHAIN_LEN varies. The (KEYWORD_LEN, CHAIN_LEN) plane is partitioned across templates: i2s_magic_number_gate varies KEYWORD_LEN at CHAIN_LEN=1; i2s_pair_relational_lookup varies DICT_SIZE at CHAIN_LEN=2; this template varies CHAIN_LEN at KEYWORD_LEN=4.
Primary pair is (vpc, vp) on the I2S axis -- chosen because the real-target strict-wins cell at libpcap br799 is on this edge.
